endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/databases/{databaseName}/operations
endpoints.description: Gets a list of operations performed on the database.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/databases/{databaseName}/operations/{operationId}/cancel
endpoints.description: Cancels the asynchronous operation on the database.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVERNAME}} with a real servername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DATABASENAME}} with a real databasename.
